diagrams.description: Pedagogy is the art, science, and practice of teaching. This flowchart illustrates its systematic framework: the ultimate goal is to foster meaningful learning and holistic development. It integrates core components (curriculum design, instructional strategies, assessment and feedback) with foundational theories (behaviorism, cognitivism, constructivism, social constructivism, critical pedagogy). These are enacted through diverse methods (direct instruction, collaborative learning, inquiry‑based learning, differentiated instruction) and supported by the learning environment (physical, digital, psychological). The process involves planning, implementation, evaluation, and reflection, culminating in outcomes such as enhanced student understanding, critical thinking, and lifelong learning skills.
